summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Full Edit functionality for AutoBid.bg. All 33 backend tests passed. Frontend admin panel tested with Playwright - all features working correctly including edit modal, remove/restore, search, and status filter.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper Pydantic models for validation
Admin endpoints properly check for admin role with require_admin dependency
Status validation correctly rejects invalid status values
Remove/restore functionality properly releases preauths when removing auctions
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin full edit functionality is complete and working. Backend tests cover: GET/PUT /admin/auctions/{id}, POST /admin/auctions/{id}/remove, POST /admin/auctions/{id}/restore, admin list with search/filter, 403 for non-admin users, 404 for non-existent auctions, invalid status validation. Frontend tests cover: admin panel tabs, edit modal with all fields, save functionality, remove with confirmation, restore, search, status filter.

backend: GET /api/admin/auctions/{id} - returns full document for admin only
PUT /api/admin/auctions/{id} - allows editing all fields including status, ends_at, current_bid_eur
PUT /api/admin/auctions/{id} - rejects invalid status values with 400
POST /api/admin/auctions/{id}/remove - sets status to 'removed' and releases preauths
POST /api/admin/auctions/{id}/restore - restores to 'live' or 'ended' based on ends_at
All admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
Removed auctions hidden from public GET /api/auctions
Regression: auth, bids, comments, watchlist, admin pending/sold all working
frontend: Admin panel /admin has 'All listings' tab with search and status filter
Edit button opens AdminEditModal with all fields populated
Save changes through modal reflects in table
Remove button with window.confirm removes auction
Restore button appears for removed/withdrawn auctions and restores them

mocked_apis.stripe_preauth: mock_pi_* tokens used for payment pre-authorization
mocked_apis.resend_email: Falls back to console log if no API key
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: Falls back to console log if no credentials
